description: Local-first MCP server for agent memory kits — persistent semantic search, witnessed retrieval, durable receipts, governed authority decisions, and claim-ledger trust enrichment. Default build uses in-process Candle embeddings (no Ollama required). Supports hybrid BM25+vector search with RRF, contradiction detection via belief propagation, typed knowledge graph with causal/temporal/semantic/entity edges, factor-graph reasoning, topological void detection, community detection, lawful subtraction, and adaptive query routing. SQLite+FTS5 authoritative store with usearch vector sidecar. All data stays on the operator's machine — no cloud, no API keys, no telemetry. Runtime tool profiles (lean, standard, agent, full) control the exposed surface. Ships with first-class integrations for Hermes Agent, Claude Code, and Codex.
name: Semantic Memory MCP

prompts.name: sm-recall
prompts.description: Search semantic memory for prior context before asking the user. Returns a structured query plan with namespace filters, retrieval mode selection, and evidence-verification steps.

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: The search query — what you want to recall

prompts.name: sm-capture-fact
prompts.description: Store a durable, source-attributed fact in semantic memory. Guides namespace selection, evidence linking, idempotency, and sensitivity classification.

arguments.name: source
arguments.description: Source attribution (URL, file path, or reference)

prompts.name: sm-audit
prompts.description: Audit the semantic memory store for health: duplicates, contradictions, stale facts, graph gaps. Read-only phase produces a report; reconciliation requires user approval.

arguments.name: namespace
arguments.description: Optional namespace to focus the audit on

prompts.name: sm-explore-graph
prompts.description: Explore the knowledge graph around a topic: find related items, trace connections between two concepts, or discover community clusters.

arguments.name: topic
arguments.description: The topic or concept to explore

prompts.name: sm-maintenance
prompts.description: Run semantic-memory store maintenance: integrity check, FTS rebuild, vacuum, re-embedding, or index repair.

prompts.name: sm-supersede
prompts.description: Replace a stale or incorrect fact with a corrected version. Preserves history via a 'supersedes' graph edge; search auto-filters the old fact.

arguments.name: old_fact_id
arguments.description: The ID of the fact to supersede

arguments.name: reason
arguments.description: Why the old fact is being superseded

resources.name: retrieval-strategy
resources.description: Primary strategy for source-first semantic-memory recall, adaptive routing, graph hydration, contradiction checks, and evidence-backed retrospectives.

resources.name: memory-curator
resources.description: Audit and improve the semantic memory store: find duplicates, contradictions, stale facts, and graph gaps. Reconcile only after user approval.

resources.name: memory-maintenance
resources.description: Store-level maintenance: integrity check, FTS rebuild, vacuum, re-embedding, index repair, and process cleanup.

resources.name: knowledge-graph-explorer
resources.description: Explore the typed knowledge graph: related items, shortest paths between concepts, community clusters, and topological voids.

resources.name: memory-keeper
resources.description: Delegate heavy memory operations (audit, bulk ingest, contradiction sweep, dedup, edge population) to a focused subagent.

resources.name: pooled-memory-operations
resources.description: Multi-device memory mesh: identity/provenance, typed synchronization, per-device SQLite primaries and server replicas, sparse routed retrieval.

resources.name: standard-workflow
resources.description: The canonical workflow for using semantic-memory MCP tools: search first, verify against current sources, store durable facts, supersede stale ones.

resources.name: authority-model
resources.description: The governed authority model: recall authority vs assertion authority vs action authority.

resource_templates.description: Fetch a skill document by name.
